◎简　　介  

　　Ernst Hofbauer (director behind many of the Schoolgirl Report films and other misc. sexploitation films) directed this wild German sexploitation film which is definitely one of the sleazier 'report' style films of the period. Compised of a series of short stories in which schoolgirls are involved in various sexual situations. A definite must have for fans of German sexploitatio...
